# Urmzd

> Urmzd's GitHub profile README repository. Contains an auto-generated profile page showcasing active projects (resume-generator, flappy-bird, chess-cli, lepus-classifier, dotfiles), GitHub stats with contribution pulse and calendar visualizations, and an AI-generated expertise breakdown. The profile is generated daily by the @urmzd/github-insights action.

## Docs

- [README](https://github.com/urmzd/urmzd/blob/main/README.md): GitHub profile with active projects, stats, and expertise

## API / Key Files

- [assets/insights/](https://github.com/urmzd/urmzd/blob/main/assets/insights/): Auto-generated SVG metrics (pulse, calendar, expertise)
